case_title: RAYMOND SHIAU ET AL VS. CONSOLIDATED SILVER LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $290. SERVED JAN-08-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CONSOLIDATED SILVER LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,817.32 FILED BY SHIAU, RAYMOND ZHANG, YINUO AS TO DEFENDANT CONSOLIDATED SILVER LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN BURKE, AGENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT CONSOLIDATED SILVER LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHIAU, RAYMOND ZHANG, YINUO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONSOLIDATED SILVER LLC $1,817.32 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,017.32, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM SUPPORTED BY DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-08-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-05-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF RAYMOND SHIAU IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF YINUO ZHANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CONSOLIDATED SILVER LLC REPRESENTED BY DAN BURKE, AGENT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
